description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage "build" and a job named "job" that runs on a Windows runner. The job executes the following script commands in order: echo "Set windows charset", chcp 65001, echo "Restoring NuGet Packages...", "C:\Program Files\NuGet\nuget.exe" restore "INJ.sln", echo "Release build...", "C:\Program Files (x86)\MSBuild\14.0\bin\msbuild.exe" INJ.sln /consoleloggerparameters:ErrorsOnly /maxcpucount /nologo /property:Configuration=Release /verbosity:quiet /property:Platform=x64, echo "Build succeeded!", "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio 12.0\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\TestWindow\vstest.console.exe" "x64\Release\UnitTest1.dll" /Platform:x64, echo "Tests are passed!". No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
